name: Extract Invoice Fields
description: Use a Bedrock LLM to extract structured invoice fields (vendor, date, total amount, line items) from raw text extracted from an invoice document.
author: system

usage_examples.raw_text:
INVOICE #12345
Vendor: Acme Corp
Date: 2024-01-15
Total: $1,500.00
Item 1: Widget x10 @ $100
Item 2: Gadget x5 @ $100
